title: Cuddles Educational Magnetic Letters and Numbers Set, 26 Pieces Each, Colorful Learning Aids for Spelling, Reading and Math Problem Solving
features: EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Perfect for developing literacy and numeracy skills through interactive learning, featuring 26 colourful magnetic pieces in each pack
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for both home and school environments, these magnetic letters and numbers can be used on any magnetic surface
SKILL DEVELOPMENT: Helps children refine motor skills and problem-solving abilities while engaging in creative learning activities
COMPLETE SET: Each pack includes either a full alphabet of 26 magnetic letters or numbers 0-9 with additional duplicates
DESIGN FEATURES: Bright, multicoloured pieces made with strong magnets for secure attachment, ideal for early learning activities
description: Transform learning into an engaging adventure with Cuddles Magnetic Letters and Numbers sets by Rysons! Each pack contains 26 colourful magnetic pieces designed to make education interactive and enjoyable. The Letters set helps children develop essential literacy skills through hands-on spelling and reading activities, while the Numbers set enhances numeracy abilities and mathematical problem-solving. These vibrant, easy-to-handle magnets are perfect for both home and classroom use, allowing children to create words and solve maths problems on any magnetic surface. The chunky, durable pieces are ideal for little hands, helping to refine motor skills while encouraging creative learning. Whether practising the alphabet, forming simple words, or working on basic calculations, these magnetic sets provide an entertaining way to build fundamental educational skills. The versatile design makes them an excellent teaching aid for parents and educators alike, suitable for various learning stages and activities.
